title: Farnesoid X receptor activation protects against renal fibrosis via modulation of β-catenin signaling

errors.description: Figure 6 contains a duplicated image where the same image was mistakenly copied for both the CTL and HFD+CDCA groups, an error acknowledged by the authors as a result of negligence during figure assembly.

There is a discrepancy between the Abstract and Method 2.6 regarding the duration of high-fat diet treatment in mice: the Abstract states 20 weeks, while the Methods section initially stated 12 weeks, causing confusion about the experimental timeline and raising concerns about data consistency throughout the paper.
